SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-18-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $180) SERVED MAR-28-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MALDONADO, JAIME

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-13-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PETER N. HADIARIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAMIE MALDONADO IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT WILL ACCEPT THE SIGNED STIPULATION BY MR. MALDONADO AGREEING TO THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PROPOSED BY THE PLAINTIFF: PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $6208.90 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN PAYMENTS. PAYMENTS OF $400 SHALL BE MADE ON THE FIRST DAY OF THE MONTH STARTING ON MAY 1ST. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JUN-13TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 3-MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL BALANCE IS PAID. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION RE:DEFAULT IN SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HADIARIS, PETER N.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-17-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. MATTER WAS SET FOR TODAY FOR PARTIES TO APPEAR TO BE HEARD RE: DEC-13-2022 FILED DEFAULT DECLARATION BY PLAINTIFF REGARDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DUE TO NO APPEARANCES, MATTER IS CONTINUED AGAIN AT 3-MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL BALANCE IS PAID. RESOLVE DATE OF SEPT 2023. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE APRIL 22ND COURT HEARING FOR A PAYMENT OF $6208.90 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN PAYMENTS. PAYMENTS OF $400 SHALL BE MADE ON THE FIRST DAY OF THE MONTH STARTING ON MAY 1ST. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE APRIL-17 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. RESOLVE DATE OF SEPT 2023. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 3-MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL BALANCE IS PAID. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
